name: Brunswick Stew C/p
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces corn (whole kernel, frozen, partially thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a crockpot, combine chicken with water, onion, ham, and potatoes.
2. Cook covered on LOW for 4 to 5 hours or until chicken is done.
3. Remove the chicken and lift it out of the pot. Discard the bones.
4. Return the cooked chicken meat to the pot.
5. Add tomatoes, lima beans, corn, salt, seasoned salt, sugar, and pepper.
6. Turn the control to HIGH. Cover and cook for 1 hour.
7. Serve in large individual bowls. Makes 8 servings.
